name: share
description: Temporary, resumable file shares on your own Cloudflare account.

scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run dry-run

FILES.description: Private R2 bucket used for temporary uploaded files.

TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY.description: Create a [Turnstile widget](https://developers.cloudflare.com/turnstile/get-started/) for your deployed hostname and paste its site key here. Share creation remains disabled until configured.

TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY.description: Paste the secret from the same Turnstile widget. It is stored as a Worker secret, never in source.

PUBLIC_URL.description: Optional canonical public URL, for example `https://share.example.com`. Leave blank to use the request hostname.
